bathymetry.label: USGS 3DEP (1-m Crater Lake NP lidar tile — multibeam survey integrated)

attempts.note: ScienceBase item 5b28e9e7e4b0702d0e816a50 is not publicly accessible (item secured or not found). Falling back to USGS 3DEP.
USGS 3DEP 1-m Crater Lake NP lidar tile (elevation range 1338–2698 m). Crater Lake NP multibeam survey is incorporated; depth = poolElev − DEM.
USGS 3DEP 1-m Crater Lake NP lidar tile; topography = max(0, DEM − poolElev) for caldera rim and slopes.
